name: Candy Clay #1
recipeInstructions: Place egg white and glucose in a bowl. Add powdered sugar and mix together with a wooden spoon. Knead with fingers until the mixture forms a ball, then knead on a surface dusted with powdered sugar until smooth and free from cracks. Wrap in plastic wrap, place into a plastic bag, and store in an air-tight container. This will keep up to 3 months. If it becomes hard after storage, remove the hardened edges and knead small amounts as needed.
